infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: SafeCircle needs your location to show nearby alerts and reports.
infoPlist.NSLocationAlwaysUsageDescription: SafeCircle needs background location to send you alerts when someone nearby is in danger.
infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: SafeCircle needs camera access to take photos for reports.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: SafeCircle needs photo library access to attach photos to reports.
